description:
Recto (secondary use): Legal agreement. Yosef b. Saʿadya al-Anṭākī stands security for Ibrāhīm b. Azhar. Mentions Nuṣayr b. Fahd. (Information in part from Goitein's index card.)

Earlier use: Accounts in Arabic script, possibly official. There are some remnants both on recto and on verso. Probably involving livestock, e.g. on recto, "569 heads" and on verso entries for ewes (niʿāj) and male (horses? sheep?) (fuḥūl).
description_he: מסמך משפטי בArabic, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
